channel.title: Ai on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on Arrans github.io

item.title: google/magika
item.description: Fast and accurate AI powered file content types detection

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

item.title: MemPalace/mempalace
item.description: The highest-scoring AI memory system ever benchmarked. And it’s free.

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, …)

item.title: jamiepine/voicebox
item.description: The open-source voice synthesis studio

item.title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.title: tmc/langchaingo
item.description: LangChain for Go, the easiest way to write LLM-based programs in Go

item.title: f/prompts.chat
item.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

item.title: openclaw/openclaw
item.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

item.title: opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf
item.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.

item.title: koala73/worldmonitor
item.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

item.title: onyx-dot-app/onyx
item.description: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM

item.title: blakeblackshear/frigate
item.description: NVR with realtime local object detection for IP cameras

item.title: steven2358/awesome-generative-ai
item.description: A curated list of modern Generative Artificial Intelligence projects and services

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers

item.title: firecrawl/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 The Web Data API for AI - Power AI agents with clean web data

item.title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
item.description: Stable Diffusion web UI

item.description: 12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

item.title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
item.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

item.title: Comfy-Org/ComfyUI
item.description: The most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

item.title: Nano-Collective/nanocoder
item.description: A beautiful local-first coding agent running in your terminal - built by the community for the community ⚒

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description: FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, MCP, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Responses API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-5, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active.

item.title: google-gemini/gemini-cli
item.description: An open-source AI agent that brings the power of Gemini directly into your terminal.

item.title: langchain-ai/langchain
item.description: The agent engineering platform

item.title: TM9657/flow-like
item.description: Flow-Like: Strongly Typed Enterprise Scale Workflows. Built for scalability, speed, seamless AI integration and rich customization.

item.title: zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw
item.description: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, ANY OS, ANY PLATFORM — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀

item.title: TabbyML/tabby
item.description: Self-hosted AI coding assistant

item.title: OpenBB-finance/OpenBB
item.description: Financial data platform for analysts, quants and AI agents.

item.title: evilsocket/pwnagotchi
item.description: (⌐■_■) - Deep Reinforcement Learning instrumenting bettercap for WiFi pwning.

item.title: pipecat-ai/pipecat
item.description: Open Source framework for voice and multimodal conversational AI

item.title: oraios/serena
item.description: A powerful MCP toolkit for coding, providing semantic retrieval and editing capabilities - the IDE for your agent

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

item.title: RSSNext/Folo
item.description: 🧡 Folo is the AI RSS Reader

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Source-controlled AI checks, enforceable in CI. Powered by the open-source Continue CLI

item.title: mattpocock/evalite
item.description: Evaluate your LLM-powered apps with TypeScript

item.title: lobehub/lobehub
item.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

item.title: LykosAI/StabilityMatrix
item.description: Multi-Platform Package Manager for Stable Diffusion

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: LocalAI is the open-source AI engine. Run any model - LLMs, vision, voice, image, video - on any hardware. No GPU required.

item.description: 🔮 ChatGPT Desktop Application (Mac, Windows and Linux)

item.title: vercel/chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: SWE-agent/SWE-agent
item.description: SWE-agent takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it, using your LM of choice. It can also be employed for offensive cybersecurity or competitive coding challenges. [NeurIPS 2024]

item.title: openvinotoolkit/openvino
item.description: OpenVINO™ is an open source toolkit for optimizing and deploying AI inference

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: getumbrel/llama-gpt
item.description: A self-hosted, offline, ChatGPT-like chatbot. Powered by Llama 2. 100% private, with no data leaving your device. New: Code Llama support!

item.title: rustformers/llm
item.description: [Unmaintained, see README] An ecosystem of Rust libraries for working with large language models

item.description: Automation engine to build, test and ship any codebase. Runs locally, in CI, or directly in the cloud

item.description: A GitHub Action invoking the Gemini CLI.

item.title: basicmachines-co/basic-memory
item.description: AI conversations that actually remember. Never re-explain your project to your AI again. Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/tyvKNccgqN

item.title: sigoden/aichat
item.description: All-in-one LLM CLI tool featuring Shell Assistant, Chat-REPL, RAG, AI Tools & Agents, with access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more.

item.description: Free universal database tool and SQL client
